name: Bettany Hughes' Lost Worlds: The Nabataeans
original_name: Bettany Hughes' Lost Worlds: The Nabataeans
overview: Bettany Hughes is on a mission to understand the secret behind the success of the Nabataeans. The glorious tombs of their cities, like Hegra in AlUla, Saudi Arabia, are proof of a rich kingdom.

trailers.title: Lost Worlds with Bettany Hughes: The Nabataeans
